slug.description: A unique identifier for the role within the organization. When provided, must begin with 'org-' and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. When omitted, a slug is auto-generated from the role name and a random suffix.

name.description: A descriptive name for the role.

description.description: An optional description of the role's purpose.

resource_type_slug.description: The slug of the resource type the role is scoped to.
